erlr 0.0.9.9000
  • Reference

Package index

Build

Build logistic regression models for exposure-response

lr_simulator()
Simulate from a logistic regression model
lr_predict()
Predictions and confidence intervals for logistic regression
lr_model()
Fit a logistic regression function
lr_scm_forward() lr_scm_backward() lr_scm_history()
Stepwise covariate modelling for logistic regression

Plot

Exposure-response plots for logistic regression models

lr_plot() lr_plot_style() lr_plot_show_model() lr_plot_show_quantiles() lr_plot_show_datastrip() lr_plot_show_groups() lr_plot_build()
Builds an exposure-response plot for a logistic regression model

Simulate

Simulation tools for exposure-response logistic regressions

lr_simulator()
Simulate from a logistic regression model
lr_vpc_sim()
VPC simulations for logistic regression models
lr_vpc_plot()
Plot VPC simulations for logistic regression models

Other

Other functions and objects

lr_data
Sample simulated data for logistic regression exposure-response models with covariates
logit() invlogit()
Logit and inverse logit functions
clopper_pearson()
Clopper-Pearson confidence interval for binary data
cut_exposure_quantile() cut_quantile()
Cut a continuous variable into quantiles
